lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹਿ ਨ ਸਕੈ ਕੋ ਤਿਉ ਬੋਲੇ ਜਿਉ ਬੋਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: taa kee keemat keh na sakai ko tiau bole jiau bolaaeidaa |9|
lines.english: None of them can describe His worth. We speak as He inspires us to speak. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਮ ਵੇਦੁ ਰਿਗੁ ਜੁਜਰੁ ਅਥਰਬਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: saam ved rig jujar atharaban |
lines.english: The Saam Veda, the Rig Veda, the Jujar Veda and the At'harva Veda

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮੇ ਮੁਖਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਹੈ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ॥
lines.translit: brahame mukh maaeaa hai trai gun |
lines.english: form the mouth of Brahma; they speak of the three gunas, the three qualities of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁੰਨਹੁ ਭਵਣ ਰਖੇ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sunahu bhavan rakhe liv laae |
lines.english: From the Primal Void, He established this world to lovingly dwell upon Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁੰਨਹੁ ਸਪਤ ਪਾਤਾਲ ਉਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sunahu sapat paataal upaae |
lines.english: From the Primal Void, He created the seven nether regions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਾਰਣੁ ਕੀਆ ਅਪਰੰਪਰਿ ਸਭੁ ਤੇਰੋ ਕੀਆ ਕਮਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: aape kaaran keea aparanpar sabh tero keea kamaaeidaa |10|
lines.english: The Infinite Lord Himself created the creation. Everyone acts as You make them act, Lord. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਜ ਤਮ ਸਤ ਕਲ ਤੇਰੀ ਛਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: raj tam sat kal teree chhaaeaa |
lines.english: Your Power is diffused through the three gunas: raajas, taamas and satva.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗੁਣਿ ਚਉਥੈ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਕਰਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: jis no kripaa kare har guramukh gun chauthai mukat karaaeidaa |11|
lines.english: Those blessed by His Grace become Gurmukh; they attain the fourth state, and are liberated. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਹਉਮੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: janam maran haumai dukh paaeaa |
lines.english: Through egotism, they suffer the pains of birth and death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਉਪਾਇ ਕੀਆ ਪਾਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: srisatt upaae keea paasaaraa |
lines.english: Creating the Universe, He made the expanse.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵ ਦਾਨਵ ਗਣ ਗੰਧਰਬ ਸਾਜੇ ਸਭਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: dev daanav gan gandharab saaje sabh likhiaa karam kamaaeidaa |12|
lines.english: He fashioned the demi-gods and demons, the heavenly heralds and celestial musicians; everyone acts according to their past karma. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁੰਨਹੁ ਉਪਜੇ ਦਸ ਅਵਤਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sunahu upaje das avataaraa |
lines.english: From the Primal Void, the ten incarnations welled up.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਮਝੈ ਰੋਗੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh samajhai rog na hoee |
lines.english: The Gurmukh understands, and does not suffer the disease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਪਉੜੀ ਜਾਣੈ ਜਨੁ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: eih gur kee paurree jaanai jan koee |
lines.english: How rare are those who understand this ladder of the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੁਗਹ ਜੁਗੰਤਰਿ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਪਰਾਇਣ ਸੋ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਭਇਆ ਪਤਿ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: jugah jugantar mukat paraaein so mukat bheaa pat paaeidaa |13|
lines.english: Throughout the ages, they are dedicated to liberation, and so they become liberated; thus they are honored. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਤਤੁ ਸੁੰਨਹੁ ਪਰਗਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: panch tat sunahu paragaasaa |
lines.english: From the Primal Void, the five elements became manifest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੁਰਾ ਭਲਾ ਦੁਇ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲੀਖੇ ਪਾਪੁ ਪੁੰਨੁ ਬੀਜਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: buraa bhalaa due masatak leekhe paap pun beejaaeidaa |14|
lines.english: Both bad and good are written on the forehead, the seeds of vice and virtue. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹ ਸੰਜੋਗੀ ਕਰਮ ਅਭਿਆਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: deh sanjogee karam abhiaasaa |
lines.english: They joined to form the body, which engages in actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਿਧਿ ਬੁਧਿ ਸਿਧਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਤੇ ਪਾਈਐ ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: ridh budh sidh giaan guroo te paaeeai poorai bhaag milaaeidaa |15|
lines.english: Riches, intellect, miraculous spiritual powers and spiritual wisdom are obtained from the Guru; through perfect destiny, they are received. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਤਮ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪੁਰਖ ਨਿਰਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: aootam satigur purakh niraale |
lines.english: The True Guru, the Primal Being, is sublime and detached.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਿ ਮਤਵਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: sabad rate har ras matavaale |
lines.english: Attuned to the Word of the Shabad, He is intoxicated with the sublime essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਈ ਬੂਝਹੁ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਕਰਹੁ ਨਿਬੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: koee boojhahu giaanee karahu niberaa |
lines.english: Only a few are spiritually wise enough to understand and know this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਮਨ ਮਾਇਆ ਕਉ ਨੇਹੁ ਘਨੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: eis man maaeaa kau nehu ghaneraa |
lines.english: This mind is so in love with Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁੰਨ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਸਚੇ ਘਰ ਬਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sun samaadh sache ghar baaraa |
lines.english: And then, one dwells with the True Lord in His celestial home, the Primal State of Absorption in Deepest Samaadhi.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਨਸਾ ਹਉਮੈ ਸਹਸਾ ਨਰੁ ਲੋਭੀ ਕੂੜੁ ਕਮਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: aasaa manasaa haumai sahasaa nar lobhee koorr kamaaeidaa |16|
lines.english: In hope and desire, egotism and skepticism, the greedy man acts falsely. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਪਾਏ ਵੀਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: satigur te paae veechaaraa |
lines.english: From the True Guru, contemplative meditation is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਨਾਦੁ ਸਬਦ ਧੁਨਿ ਸਚੁ ਰਾਮੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੭॥੫॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: naanak niramal naad sabad dhun sach raamai naam samaaeidaa |17|5|17|
lines.english: O Nanak, the immaculate sound current of the Naad, and the Music of the Shabad resound; one merges into the True Name of the Lord. ||17||5||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਦੇਖਾ ਤਹ ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: jeh dekhaa teh deen deaalaa |
lines.english: Wherever I look, I see the Lord, merciful to the meek.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Maaroo, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਆ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਸਮਾਈ ਰਹਿਓ ਨਿਰਾਲਮੁ ਰਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jeea andar jugat samaaee rahio niraalam raaeaa |1|
lines.english: He pervades all beings in His mysterious way; the Sovereign Lord remains detached. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਇ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਕਿਰਪਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: aae na jaaee prabh kirapaalaa |
lines.english: God is compassionate; He does not come or go in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗੁ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਛਾਇਆ ਜਿਸੁ ਬਾਪੁ ਨ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jag tis kee chhaaeaa jis baap na maaeaa |
lines.english: The world is a reflection of Him; He has no father or mother.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਭੈਣ ਨ ਭਰਾਉ ਕਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naa tis bhain na bharaau kamaaeaa |
lines.english: He has not acquired any sister or brother.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਓਪਤਿ ਖਪਤਿ ਕੁਲ ਜਾਤੀ ਓਹੁ ਅਜਰਾਵਰੁ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naa tis opat khapat kul jaatee ohu ajaraavar man bhaaeaa |2|
lines.english: There is no creation or destruction for Him; He has no ancestry or social status. The Ageless Lord is pleasing to my mind. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਅਕਾਲ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਸਿਰਿ ਕਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: too akaal purakh naahee sir kaalaa |
lines.english: You are the Deathless Primal Being. Death does not hover over Your head.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤ ਸੰਤੋਖਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਅਤਿ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਸਹਜ ਭਾਇ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sat santokh sabad at seetal sehaj bhaae liv laaeaa |3|
lines.english: You are true and content; the Word of Your Shabad is cool and soothing. Through it, we are lovingly, intuitively attuned to You. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਅਲੇਖ ਅਗੰਮ ਨਿਰਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: too purakh alekh agam niraalaa |
lines.english: You are the unseen inaccessible and detached Primal Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਰਬ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਗੁਰਿ ਅਨਹਦ ਸਬਦਿ ਦਿਖਾਇਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: niramal jot sarab jagajeevan gur anahad sabad dikhaaeaa |4|
lines.english: The immaculate Light is the Life of the whole world. The Guru reveals the unstruck melody of the Shabad. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਵਰਤਾਇ ਚਉਥੈ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: trai varataae chauthai ghar vaasaa |
lines.english: The three qualities are pervasive; the Lord dwells in His home, the fourth state.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲ ਬਿਕਾਲ ਕੀਏ ਇਕ ਗ੍ਰਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: kaal bikaal kee ik graasaa |
lines.english: He has made death and birth into a bite of food.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਤਮ ਜਨ ਸੰਤ ਭਲੇ ਹਰਿ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: aootam jan sant bhale har piaare |
lines.english: Sublime and good are those humble Saints, the Beloveds of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਜੀਅ ਸਭਿ ਤੇਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: too antarajaamee jeea sabh tere |
lines.english: You are the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts. All beings belong to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸ ਮਾਤੇ ਪਾਰਿ ਉਤਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har ras maate paar utaare |
lines.english: They are intoxicated with the sublime essence of the Lord, and are carried across to the other side.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰੇਣ ਸੰਤ ਜਨ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak ren sant jan sangat har gur parasaadee paaeaa |5|
lines.english: Nanak is the dust of the Society of the Saints; by Guru's Grace, he finds the Lord. ||5||
